title: automations for weekdays only
excerpt: I would like to be able to set up automations that will only happen on weekdays. I dont need reminders on the weekend and it causes multiple emails/ notifications that are not needed.

posts.author: amyREagent (Amy)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to set up automations that will only happen on weekdays. I dont need reminders on the weekend and it causes multiple emails/ notifications that are not needed.

posts.author: Ozi (Oz Israel)
posts.cookedHtml: Important feature! I would ask to exclude even holidays.

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Depending on what your automation is and if it’s necessary to use a 3rd party serivce, zzBots could possibly help. You can have an automation run on a schedule by specifying the weekdays.
